free_text: -SHORT RANGE ENERGY DEPENDENCE OF THE NEUTRON WIDTH OF
AL - CONTAINER) WITH 177 - HF ENRICHED TO 74PC.
.NEUTRON FLUX WAS DETERMINED WITH A 10 - B SLAB
VIEWED BY A NA-I(TL) DETECTOR. ABSOLUTE CALIBRATION
WAS OBTAINED BY THE BALCK RESONANCE TECHNIQUE
EXTRACTED FROM RAW DATA BY MEANS OF A COMBINED
AREA ANALYSIS OF CAPTURE AND SELFINDICATION
DATA, USING A MODIFIED VERSION OF THE TACASI CODE.
.A COMPARISON WITH OLDER DATA SHOWS REASONABLE AGREE -
MENBT UP TO A NEUTRON ENERGY OF ABOUT 70EV.
.ABOVE THAT ENERGY THE AUTHORS OBSERVE RELATIVELY
MORE RESONANCES, WHICH INDICATES THAT IN EARLIER
DATA A STEADILY INCREASING FRACTION OF RESONANCES
INDIVIDUAL GAMMA-GAMMA IS GIVEN WERE CALCULATED FROM
THE AREA ASSUMING AN AVERAGE GAMMA-GAMMA OF 74MILLI-
EV FOR SPIN-3 AND 58MILLI-EV FOR SPIN-4 RESONANCES.
Corrected for missed resonances by Monte Carlo, unless
